Class Goal

java.lang.Object
model.Goal
public class Goal extends Object
This class represents a financial goal to be achieved. It tracks the target amount and the current saved money.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Goal(String name, double target)
    Constructs a Goal with zero initial saved amount.
    Goal(String name, double target, double current)
    Constructs a Goal with a name, target amount, and current saved amount.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void

    Adds an amount to the current saved amount.

    Creates a Goal object from a formatted file line.

    Returns the current saved amount.
    String

    Returns the goal name.
    double
    getProgress()
    Calculates the progress percentage towards the goal.
    String
    getStatus()
    Returns the current status of the goal.
    double
    getTarget()
    Returns the target amount to be achieved.
    String

    Converts the goal data into a string format for file storage.

  • Constructor Details

    • Goal

      public Goal(String name, double target, double current)
      Constructs a Goal with a name, target amount, and current saved amount.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the goal
      target - the target amount to be achieved
      current - the current saved amount

    • Goal

      public Goal(String name, double target)
      Constructs a Goal with zero initial saved amount.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the goal
      target - the target amount to be achieved

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the goal name.
      Returns:
      the goal name

    • getTarget

      public double getTarget()
      Returns the target amount to be achieved.
      Returns:
      the target amount

    • getCurrent

      public double getCurrent()
      Returns the current saved amount.
      Returns:
      the current saved amount

    • addSaving

      public void addSaving(double amount)
      Adds an amount to the current saved amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount to add

    • getProgress

      public double getProgress()
      Calculates the progress percentage towards the goal.
      Returns:
      the progress percentage

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the current status of the goal.
      Returns:
      "Completed" if the target is reached, otherwise "In Progress"

    • toFileLine

      public String toFileLine()
      Converts the goal data into a string format for file storage.
      Returns:
      a comma-separated string (name, target, current)

    • fromFileLine

      public static Goal fromFileLine(String line)
      Creates a Goal object from a formatted file line.
      Parameters:
      line - a comma-separated string representing a goal
      Returns:
      a Goal object created from the given line
